# GitHub Repository About Section

Use this content for the GitHub repository "About" section (visible in the sidebar).

## Repository Description

```
Enterprise microservices platform for base station operations and maintenance. Built with Java 17, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Docker, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. Demonstrates microservices architecture, service discovery, API gateway patterns, and containerization.
```

## Topics/Tags

Add these topics to your repository:

```
java
spring-boot
microservices
spring-cloud
eureka
api-gateway
docker
docker-compose
postgresql
mongodb
rest-api
maven
jpa
service-discovery
telecommunications
base-station
monitoring
notifications
enterprise-java
cloud-native
```

## Website (Optional)

If you have a deployed version:
```
http://localhost:8080
```

## Instructions

1. Go to your repository on GitHub
2. Click the gear icon (⚙️) next to "About" section
3. Paste the description above
4. Add the topics/tags listed above
5. (Optional) Add website URL if you have one deployed
